name: Material Adaptation Strategy
consequences: Immediate: Retrofitting existing structures with safety tech → Systemic: 25% faster scaling through modular design → Strategic: Risk of over-investment in physical infrastructure
options: Standard safety retrofit with passive monitoring systems

AI-driven predictive maintenance using embedded IoT sensors
review: Controls Cost Efficiency vs. Technological Sophistication. Weakness: The options fail to consider regional building code variability in Bonn.
